mapper.sql: id, order_no, user_id, order_status, total_amount, pay_amount, pay_time, remark, address_snapshot, cancel_reason, cancel_time, create_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO normal_order ( order_no, user_id, order_status, total_amount, pay_amount, pay_time, remark, address_snapshot, cancel_reason, cancel_time ) VALUES ( #{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{orderStatus}, #{totalAmount}, #{payAmount}, #{payTime}, #{remark}, #{addressSnapshot}, #{cancelReason}, #{cancelTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, order_no, user_id, order_status, total_amount, pay_amount, pay_time, remark, address_snapshot, cancel_reason, cancel_time, create_time, update_time FROM normal_order WHERE order_status = #{expectedStatus} AND create_time <= #{deadline} ORDER BY create_time ASC, id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
